subcodes.first_line: The Book hath been sent down and the All-Bountiful hath come. Thus did We behold the people of the veil in tumult and agitation, hastening unto [3.5s]... ...They that follow their lusts and corrupt inclinations have erred and dissipated their efforts. They indeed are of the lost
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد نزل الکتاب و اتی الوهاب اذا راینا اهل الحجاب فی ولج و اضطراب قد هرعوا الی
subcodes.subjects: @justice and wrath of God, @chastisement and requital, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @Word of God and human limitations, @call to action
